Title: Starry Night Window Cushion Print Pillow
Description:
Bring the tranquil beauty of a starry night into your living space with this cozy throw pillow cushion. Featuring a serene window view accented by a glowing indoor light and scattered stars, this pillow adds a touch of celestial calm to any room.

Design & Ambiance: The artwork captures the feeling of looking out a window late at night, combining deep navy tones with soft, twinkling starlight. It's perfect for creating a comforting and dreamy ambiance, making it an ideal accent for bedrooms, living rooms, or reading nooks.

Premium Comfort: Designed for maximum comfort, this throw pillow is printed on high-quality, durable fabric. It offers a soft texture and substantial feel, making it perfect for lounging, reading, or simply decorating.

Ideal Gift: This unique piece makes a thoughtful and memorable gift for stargazers, lovers of cozy decor, or anyone who appreciates celestial art and peaceful moments. It enhances any room's aesthetic appeal.

Material & Care: (Details based on assumed product material: Durable fabric cover with a soft, smooth finish. Recommended care: Spot clean or dry clean.)
